description: Reference environment — Java API + React front end (two-process), preconfigured to import and launch. Clones coderflow-reference-apps and runs the java-react app.

docker_config.pre_clone_instructions: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y default-jdk maven && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

repos.name: coderflow-reference-apps
repos.post_clone_action:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/java-react/api && mvn -q -DskipTests package
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/java-react/web && npm install

application_server.name: Java + React
application_server.start_command:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/java-react/api && mvn -q spring-boot:run &
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/java-react/web && npm run dev
